name: Feature Request

---

## Problem
<!-- What frustrates you or what you can't do today? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How would you like it to work? Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Other approaches you've thought about. -->

## Who Benefits
<!-- Is this specific to your workflow, or broadly useful? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Mockups, links, examples — anything that helps illustrate the idea. -->
